commands.review_summary:
The branch wraps draft-2020-12 bundle MCP schema setup failures in the existing invalid-schema prefix, preserves the original failure as `cause`, and adds a hostile `properties` proxy regression.

PR surface: Source +27, Tests +19. Total +46 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main calls `Object.entries` over draft schema maps before any bundle MCP setup wrapper, so a throwing `properties` proxy can leak its raw error. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No automation repair is needed; maintainers should finish the draft and pending broad-proof path, then merge through normal review if checks stay green.

target.title: fix(agents): wrap bundle MCP schema setup errors
target.body:
## Summary
- Wrap draft-2020-12 bundle MCP schema setup failures with the existing `Invalid MCP draft-2020-12 JSON Schema` error prefix.
- Preserve the original setup failure as `cause` and keep non-draft schemas on the SDK AJV validator path.
- Add a regression for a hostile MCP catalog schema whose `properties` proxy throws during schema format stripping.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.ts src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.ts src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: hostile draft-2020-12 MCP catalog schemas can no longer leak raw setup-time traversal/compile failures past the bundle MCP schema validator.
Real environment tested: local Codex GWT on macOS using the repo Vitest wrapper and source lint/format wrappers.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`.
Evidence after fix: the regression with a throwing `properties` proxy now throws `Invalid MCP draft-2020-12 JSON Schema: bundle schema properties ownKeys exploded`.
Observed result after fix: focused Vitest passed 1 file / 31 tests; format, oxlint, diff check, and local + branch autoreview passed.
What was not tested: full `pnpm check:changed` is pending remote Crabbox/Testbox proof after PR creation.
target.author: vincentkoc
